figures.caption: FIG. 1. Conditional Flow Matching network structure

FIG. 2. Upper-Left: Single-event d2N/dηdϕ of charged hadrons from the hydro response induced by γ-jets from CoLBT-hydro simulations of 0-10% central Pb+Pb collisions at √ sNN = 5.02 TeV with 25 randomly sampled initial conditions. Upper-Right: The same as Upper-Left panel except from Flow Matching model generations. Lower-Left: The same as the Upper-Left panel except averaged over 100 simulations for each initial conditions. The same as Lower-Left panel except from Flow Matching model generations. The vertical axis is η, ranging from [−2.76, 2.76]. The horizontal axis is ϕ, ranging from [0, 2π]. The spectra are integrated over the transverse momentum over pT ∈ [0, 4] GeV/c.

FIG. 4. The location distributions of dark spots of diffusion wakes in rapidity η (upper) and azimuthal angle ϕ (lower) from the Flow Matching model (shaded histograms) as compared to the CoLBT-hydro (open histograms) simulations.

FIG. 5. The correlations between hot (Front wake) and dark (Diffusion wake) spot in ∆η = ηhot − ηdark (upper) and ∆ϕ = ϕhot − ϕdark (lower) from Flow Matching model (shaded histograms) as compared to the CoLBT-hydro (open histograms) simulations.

FIG. 6. The event-averaged transverse momentum pT (upper), pseudo-rapidity η (middle) and azimuthal angle ϕ (lower) distributions of the hydro response charged hadrons from CoLBT-hydro simulations (red solid) and Flow Matching model generations (black dot-dashed). Spectra from the background hydro without jets (blue dashed) are also plotted for comparison. The effective temperatures Teff are extracted by fitting the large pT ∈ [1, 4] GeV/c region of the pT spectra with dN/dpT = ApT exp(−pT /Teff).

FIG. 7. Event-averaged two-dimensional charged hadron spectrum d2Nch/dηdϕ of the hydro response induced by γ-jets from the CoLBT-hydro (upper) and Flow Matching model (lower) generations. The direct photon (γ) is set at ϕγ = 0.

FIG. 8. Rapidity asymmetry of the hydro-response charged hadrons induced by γ-jets as a function of ηh for pT ∈ [0, 4] GeV/c and |ϕh − ϕγ | < π/2 from the CoLBT-hydro (black solid) and the Flow Matching model generations (red dotdashed). The shaded bands correspond to the statistical uncertainty ±δA(ηh).
